chunks.title: God as Eternal Dwelling Place
chunks.reason: Establishes God's eternal nature and His role as humanity's dwelling place.

chunks.title: Human Frailty and Divine Anger
chunks.reason: Contrasts human transience with God's wrath to argue for the need for wisdom.

chunks.title: Prayer for Restoration and Favor
chunks.reason: A concluding petition for God's return, satisfaction, and blessing upon the work of the people.
